subcodes.first_line: O Friend! The Best-Beloved maketh mention of thee, and verily He is the Wronged One Who hath been imprisoned in the path of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیب یذکرک المحبوب و انه لهو المظلوم الذی سجن فی سبیل الله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
